beech.name: Beech
beech.scoring: 5 points each if you have 4+ Beeches

oak.name: Oak
oak.scoring: 10 points each if you have 8+ tree species

linden.name: Linden
linden.scoring: 1pt each; 3pts each if you have the most Lindens (or tied)

sycamore.name: Sycamore
sycamore.scoring: 1 point per tree in your forest

silver_fir.name: Silver Fir
silver_fir.scoring: 2 points per card attached to Silver Firs

bullfinch.name: Bullfinch
bullfinch.scoring: 2 points per insect in your forest

chaffinch.name: Chaffinch
chaffinch.context: How many Chaffinches are on a Beech?

great_spotted_woodpecker.name: Great Spotted Woodpecker
great_spotted_woodpecker.scoring: 10 points if you have the most trees (or tied)

red_squirrel.name: Red Squirrel
red_squirrel.context: How many Red Squirrels are on an Oak?

golden_eagle.name: Golden Eagle
golden_eagle.scoring: 1 point per pawed animal + 1 per amphibian

nightingale.name: Nightingale
nightingale.context: How many Nightingales are on a shrub?

common_toad.scoring: 5 points per Common Toad sharing a tree with another Common Toad
common_toad.context: How many Common Toads share a tree with another?

tree_frog.name: Tree Frog
tree_frog.scoring: 5 points per gnat per Tree Frog

wood_ant.name: Wood Ant
wood_ant.scoring: 2 points per card in bottom slots (auto-counted)

moss.name: Moss
moss.scoring: 10 points each if you have 10+ trees

wild_strawberries.name: Wild Strawberries
wild_strawberries.scoring: 10 points each if you have 8+ tree species

digitalis.name: Digitalis
digitalis.scoring: Plant diversity set: 0/1/3/6/10/15 per unique plant type

barbastelle.name: Barbastelle
barbastelle.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

bechsteins_bat.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

brown_long_eared_bat.name: Brown Long-eared Bat
brown_long_eared_bat.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

greater_horseshoe_bat.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

savis_pipistrelle.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

common_pipistrelle.name: Common Pipistrelle
common_pipistrelle.scoring: Bats: 5 pts each if 3+ bat species

roe_deer.name: Roe Deer
roe_deer.scoring: 3 points per card with the same tree symbol (including itself)

red_deer.name: Red Deer
red_deer.scoring: 1 point per tree and per plant

chamois.name: Chamois
chamois.scoring: 3 points per card with the same tree symbol (including itself)

lynx.name: Lynx
lynx.scoring: 10 points if at least 1 Roe Deer

wild_boar.name: Wild Boar

european_hare.name: European Hare
european_hare.scoring: Points equal to total Hare count per Hare

european_fat_dormouse.scoring: 15 points if at a tree with a bat (in the opposite slot)

fox.name: Fox
fox.scoring: 2 points per Hare in your forest

mountain_hare.name: Mountain Hare
mountain_hare.scoring: Points equal to total Hare count (counts as Hare)

elk.name: Elk
elk.scoring: 2 pts per tree sapling and per card showing Elk's tree symbols (incl. itself)

european_bison.name: European Bison
european_bison.scoring: 2 pts per card showing one of its tree symbols (incl. itself)

european_polecat.name: European Polecat
european_polecat.scoring: 10 points if alone on its tree

european_wildcat.name: European Wildcat
european_wildcat.scoring: 1 point per woodland edge card (including itself)

cave.name: Cave

collectors_cave.scoring: Each regular cave card scores 2 instead of 1

bat_cave.name: Bat Cave
bat_cave.scoring: Each bat scores an additional 3 points

lonely_cave.name: Lonely Cave
lonely_cave.scoring: 5 points if no regular cave cards; otherwise 0
